utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ooh , this is it ! Oh , that is him ! That is him !

emotion_cause.span: 1_this is it ! Oh , that is him ! That is him !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Wait a second , or maybe you can go in first .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He is not really my type .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No not you , Dr . Drake Remoray . You can ask him questions and see what he like . People tell doctors everything .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But lately all the guys I meet seem really nice at first , then they turn out to be the biggest jerks .

emotion_cause.span: 6_lately all the guys I meet seem really nice at first , then they turn out to be the biggest jerks .
